steps.t: Glorfindel is at the Dawn-warden in Idagâl.
Rahâzi is by the dragon-bones in the Dry-whelm.
Your companions agreed to meet back at the village of Ahâba in Idagâl, on the central island in the oasis.
Inkanûsh waits at the village of Ahâba, eager to tell you what he has discovered.

Inkanûsh is at the village of Ahâba.
Inkanûsh suggested you join your companions at north-east Ahâba.
